title: Time window: user pastes 80 lines from middle of a 4-hour outage
scenario: User shares only the loud middle of an outage. Onset (5–30 min before) and recovery (after) are not represented. Drawing onset / recovery conclusions from this slice is unsound.
expected_finding: Skill must apply Time Window Boundary Gate, label coverage as 'partial — only middle of incident', refuse to draw onset/recovery conclusions, and request additional data via Open Questions.
